item.title: Ted Eyes a 1934 Chevrolet
item.description: Ted takes a close look at a classic 1934 Chevrolet. A peek into vintage car inspection and potential deals.

item.description: Explore a rare jade piece valued at $40,000. A fascinating look at luxury finds and the jade market.

item.title: Moose Meets Truck
item.description: A 400kg moose encounters a truck on the road. Watch this unexpected wildlife moment unfold safely.

item.title: Mustang Takes the Lead
item.description: Watch a Mustang pull ahead in a thrilling street race, showcasing speed, skill, and classic muscle car power.

item.title: Truck vs. 20ft Challenge
item.description: A truck faces a tricky 20-foot load on the road. Watch how the team handles this heavy-haul challenge.

item.description: A long-lost World War II shipwreck has been found underwater, revealing history preserved beneath the waves.

item.description: A historic steamship, long lost, is found beneath the waves. Explore the mystery and history uncovered beneath the ocean.

item.title: Storm Hits the Jade Deal
item.description: A sudden setback disrupts a jade business deal in Jade City. A look at the challenges and how the team navigates unexpected obstacles.
